description: Official card data for Cigga Go physical card game

pack_cards.name_cn: 天子（千里江山青绿中支）
冬虫夏草（黄金盛世中支）
娇子（宽窄国宝之恋细支）

counterfeit_cards.flavor_cn: 包装精美但烟丝发黑，拉丝不均匀
counterfeit_cards.flavor_en: Beautiful packaging, but the tobacco is dark and uneven

counterfeit_cards.flavor_en: The panda is printed crooked with a vacant stare

counterfeit_cards.flavor_cn: 防伪码一刮就没，钢印模糊
counterfeit_cards.flavor_en: Security code rubs off instantly, blurry stamp
counterfeit_cards.finish_cn: 做旧磨砂 + 暗纹「假」字水印

counterfeit_cards.flavor_cn: 字体间距不对，老烟民一眼就认出来
counterfeit_cards.flavor_en: Wrong font spacing — veteran smokers spot it instantly
counterfeit_cards.finish_cn: 做旧磨砂 + 暗纹「假」字水印

expansion_international.name: International Brands Expansion
expansion_international.description: 21 international cigarette cards. Add to base set to support 8-player games.

expansion_collector.name: Collector's Limited Pack
expansion_collector.description: 12 discontinued/historical cigarette cards with collector premium (+1 rarity).
